load.en: The workers loaded the boxes onto the truck.

local.en: We ate at a local restaurant.
local.zh: 我們在一家當地餐廳吃飯。

lone.en: A lone tree stood on the hill.
lone.zh: 一棵孤零零的樹立在山丘上。

loss.en: The team's loss made the fans sad.
loss.zh: 球隊的失利讓球迷很難過。

lower.en: Please lower your voice in the library.

luck.en: Good luck on your test tomorrow!

maintain.en: It is important to maintain good health.

male.en: A male peacock has colorful feathers.
male.zh: 公孔雀有色彩鮮豔的羽毛。

manager.en: The manager solved the problem quickly.

manner.en: He spoke in a polite manner.
manner.zh: 他以有禮貌的方式說話。

marriage.en: Their marriage has lasted thirty years.
marriage.zh: 他們的婚姻已維持三十年。

marry.en: She will marry her boyfriend next year.

mask.en: He wore a mask to the party.

mass.en: A mass of people filled the street.

master.en: It takes years to master the piano.

mat.en: Wipe your feet on the mat.

mature.en: She is very mature for her age.
mature.zh: 她以她的年紀來說很成熟。

meaning.en: What is the meaning of this word?

means.en: A bicycle is a cheap means of travel.
means.zh: 腳踏車是便宜的交通方式。

measure.en: Use a ruler to measure the line.

medical.en: He needs medical help right away.

melody.en: The song has a beautiful melody.

membership.en: My gym membership ends next month.
membership.zh: 我的健身房會員下個月到期。

memory.en: I have happy memories of my childhood.
memory.zh: 我有許多童年的快樂回憶。

mention.en: She mentioned that she was moving.

message.en: I left a message on his phone.
message.zh: 我在他手機上留了訊息。

metal.en: The spoon is made of metal.

meter.en: The taxi meter showed two hundred dollars.
meter.zh: 計程車的計費表顯示兩百元。

method.en: This is a good method for learning words.
method.zh: 這是個背單字的好方法。

mile.en: The town is five miles away.

military.en: He served in the military for two years.

minor.en: It was only a minor injury.

minority.en: Only a minority of students agreed.

mirror.en: She looked at herself in the mirror.

mix.en: Mix the flour with the water.

mixture.en: The drink is a mixture of fruit juices.
mixture.zh: 這杯飲料是果汁的混合。

mood.en: She is in a good mood today.

mop.en: He used a mop to clean the floor.

motion.en: The motion of the boat made me dizzy.

motorcycle.en: He rides a motorcycle to work.

mug.en: She drank coffee from a big mug.
mug.zh: 她用一個大馬克杯喝咖啡。

musical.en: We watched a musical on stage.
musical.zh: 我們看了一場舞台音樂劇。

musician.en: The musician played the guitar well.
musician.zh: 那位音樂家吉他彈得很好。

nail.en: He hammered a nail into the wall.
nail.zh: 他把一根釘子敲進牆裡。

narrow.en: The path is too narrow for a car.
narrow.zh: 這條路太窄了，車過不去。

nation.en: The whole nation watched the game.

natural.zh: 我們應該保護自然資源。

naughty.en: The naughty boy broke the window.
naughty.zh: 那個調皮的男孩打破了窗戶。

nearly.en: It is nearly time for lunch.

needle.en: She sewed the button with a needle.

negative.en: Try not to have negative thoughts.
negative.zh: 盡量不要有負面的想法。

neighbor.en: Our neighbor is kind and friendly.
neighbor.zh: 我們的鄰居既親切又友善。

neither.en: Neither of them came to the party.

nephew.en: My nephew is five years old.

nerve.en: It took nerve to speak in front of everyone.
nerve.zh: 在大家面前說話需要勇氣。

nervous.en: She felt nervous before the speech.

network.en: The phone has no network signal here.
network.zh: 手機在這裡沒有網路訊號。

niece.en: My niece loves to draw pictures.

nod.en: She nodded to show she agreed.

none.en: None of the answers are correct.

noodle.en: I had a bowl of beef noodles.

nor.en: He likes neither tea nor coffee.
nor.zh: 他既不喜歡茶也不喜歡咖啡。

northern.en: It snows a lot in the northern part.

notebook.en: I write my notes in a notebook.
notebook.zh: 我把筆記寫在筆記本上。

novel.en: She is reading a long novel.
novel.zh: 她正在讀一本長篇小說。

object.zh: 那個奇怪的物體是什麼？

obvious.en: It was obvious that he was tired.

occur.en: Accidents often occur on this road.

offer.en: She offered me a cup of tea.

official.en: This is the official website of the school.

operate.en: Do you know how to operate this machine?
operate.zh: 你知道怎麼操作這台機器嗎？

opinion.en: In my opinion, the movie was great.

ordinary.en: It was just an ordinary day.

organ.en: The heart is an important organ.

organization.en: She works for a charity organization.
organization.zh: 她在一個慈善組織工作。

origin.en: No one knows the origin of this custom.
origin.zh: 沒有人知道這個習俗的由來。

owner.en: The owner of the dog is very kind.

pain.en: He felt a sharp pain in his arm.

painting.en: The painting hangs on the wall.

pajamas.en: He put on his pajamas before bed.

pale.en: She looked pale after the long trip.
pale.zh: 長途旅行後她臉色蒼白。

pan.en: Heat the oil in a pan.

papaya.en: Papaya is good for your stomach.

pardon.en: Pardon me, could you say that again?
pardon.zh: 不好意思，你可以再說一次嗎？

participate.en: Many students participated in the contest.

particular.en: Is there a particular book you want?
particular.zh: 你有特別想要哪一本書嗎？

partner.en: Find a partner for this activity.
partner.zh: 找一個夥伴一起做這個活動。

password.en: Don't share your password with others.

paste.en: Cut the picture and paste it here.

path.en: We followed the path through the woods.
path.zh: 我們沿著小路穿過樹林。

patient.en: The nurse cared for the patient.

pattern.en: The shirt has a flower pattern.

peace.zh: 每個人都希望世界和平。

peaceful.en: The village is quiet and peaceful.

peach.en: This peach is soft and sweet.

peak.en: They reached the peak of the mountain.

pear.en: I ate a juicy pear after lunch.
pear.zh: 午餐後我吃了一顆多汁的梨。

per.en: The car runs at sixty miles per hour.
per.zh: 這輛車以每小時六十英哩行駛。

perfect.en: She got a perfect score on the test.

period.en: We have a short break between periods.
period.zh: 我們在課與課之間有短暫的休息。

phrase.en: Write a sentence using this phrase.
phrase.zh: 用這個片語造一個句子。

pillow.en: The pillow is soft and comfortable.

pizza.en: We ordered a large cheese pizza.
pizza.zh: 我們點了一個大的起司披薩。

plain.en: She wore a plain white shirt.
plain.zh: 她穿著一件樸素的白襯衫。

platform.en: The train arrived at platform two.

playground.en: Children are playing on the playground.

pleasant.en: We had a pleasant afternoon together.
pleasant.zh: 我們一起度過了愉快的下午。

poem.en: She wrote a poem about spring.
poem.zh: 她寫了一首關於春天的詩。

poet.en: The poet read his work aloud.
poet.zh: 詩人大聲朗讀他的作品。

policy.en: The school has a strict policy on bullying.
policy.zh: 學校對霸凌有嚴格的政策。

pop.en: She likes to listen to pop music.

population.en: The city has a large population.

pork.en: We had pork and rice for dinner.

port.en: The ship sailed into the port.

position.en: Put the chair back in its position.

positive.en: She always keeps a positive attitude.
positive.zh: 她總是保持正面的態度。

possibility.en: There is a possibility of rain today.

post.en: I will post the letter tomorrow.

postcard.en: She sent me a postcard from Paris.
postcard.zh: 她從巴黎寄給我一張明信片。

praise.en: The teacher praised her hard work.

pray.en: They pray for peace every day.

press.en: Press the button to ring the bell.

pressure.en: She felt pressure before the exam.

pride.en: He looked at his work with pride.
pride.zh: 他自豪地看著自己的作品。

priest.en: The priest spoke kindly to the people.
priest.zh: 牧師親切地對眾人說話。

primary.en: Her primary goal is to pass the exam.
primary.zh: 她的首要目標是通過考試。

prince-princess.en: The prince lived in a great castle.
prince-princess.zh: 王子住在一座宏偉的城堡裡。

principal.en: The principal welcomed the new students.

print.en: Please print the report for me.

printer.en: The printer is out of paper.

prison.en: The thief was sent to prison.

prisoner.en: The prisoner waited for his trial.

private.en: This is a private room; please knock.
private.zh: 這是私人房間，請先敲門。

prize.en: She won first prize in the contest.

production.en: The production of the movie took two years.
production.zh: 這部電影的製作花了兩年。

progress.en: She is making good progress in English.

project.en: We finished the science project together.
project.zh: 我們一起完成了科學專題。

promise.en: He kept his promise to help me.

proper.en: Wear proper shoes for the hike.
